BackstoryDef.title: feral hunger
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Raised where scraps were scarce and fights were constant, this pawn learned early that teeth, fists, and speed settled most problems before words ever could.

BackstoryDef.title: pit-fight mauler
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: By adulthood, this pawn had earned a living in rough circles where brute force and relentless charges mattered more than grace. Once they latched on, they rarely let go.

BackstoryDef.title: collapse survivor
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Buried young beneath twisted beams and rubble, this pawn spent their earliest years dragging through cramped gaps and learning to keep moving no matter what was broken.

BackstoryDef.title: tunnel scrabbler
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This pawn made a grim trade in storm drains, vents, and collapsed service shafts, slipping through places others would never dare enter and clawing through the dark for work.

BackstoryDef.title: chemical ward child
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Raised near leaking drums, harsh cleaners, and ruptured tanks, this pawn grew up amid fumes and pressure valves, always one bad day away from a catastrophic mess.

BackstoryDef.title: pressurized tank cleaner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This pawn spent long shifts scraping residue from sealed vats and cracked pipes. Everyone who worked that line smelled wrong, walked wrong, and seemed one spark away from disaster.

BackstoryDef.title: ward patient
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Illness shaped this pawn from the beginning. Quarantine cots, sour medicine, and long fevers taught them to live with weakness, filth, and the constant threat of contagion.

BackstoryDef.title: pesthouse orderly
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This pawn worked in the places others avoided, hauling linens, scrubbing filth, and handling the contagious dead long after the healers had given up on recovery.

BackstoryDef.title: flood camp orphan
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Floodwater took the home, then the road, then nearly everyone else. This pawn learned to read currents, cling to wreckage, and breathe panic down before it drowned them too.

BackstoryDef.title: net diver
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This pawn worked the shallows and drowned harbors, cutting loose snagged nets, hauling traps from black water, and returning to shore with more scars than coin.

BackstoryDef.title: foundry brat
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Raised beside furnaces and cargo lifts, this pawn grew up hauling more than most adults could manage. Hard labor broadened the shoulders and narrowed the patience.

BackstoryDef.title: dockside enforcer
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This pawn enforced rules where cranes groaned, cargo vanished, and arguments ended in broken teeth. When size was not enough, they learned to use it with intent.

BackstoryDef.title: butcher's runner
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Quick hands and a talent for reaching what others could not made this pawn useful in cramped slaughter sheds, where hooks, chains, and hanging weight were part of daily life.

BackstoryDef.title: meat hook rigger
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This pawn rigged pulleys and drag lines in processing halls, snaring loads from a distance and hauling them close with ugly efficiency. Coworkers learned to keep clear of the swing.

BackstoryDef.title: quiet drifter
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: Too quiet for crowds and too strange for comfort, this pawn learned to survive on the edges of camps and alleys, watching others closely and moving only when it mattered.

BackstoryDef.title: alley shadow
BackstoryDef.baseDesc: This pawn survived by appearing harmless, keeping to the outskirts, and waiting until trust or pity opened a door. They learned that patience could be deadlier than rage.
